Empowering the Government of Canada with: Empowering the Government of Canada with responsible AI.
EVA-JP description: Bilingual AI assistant for jurisprudence and case law research.
EVA Accelerator description: Self-service workspace booking portal for AI environments.
About description: The AI Centre of Excellence (AICOE) develops responsible, accessible, and bilingual AI solutions for the Government of Canada.
about.mission.heading: Our Mission
about.mission.body: The AI Centre of Excellence partners with Government of Canada departments to build, evaluate, and deploy responsible AI systems — ensuring they are explainable, bilingual, accessible, and aligned with GC policies.
about.pillars.heading: Our Pillars
about.pillar1.title: Responsible AI
about.pillar1.body: We design for fairness, transparency, and accountability in every system we build.
about.pillar2.title: Bilingual by Design
about.pillar2.body: All AICOE products work equally well in English and French from day one.
about.pillar3.title: Accessible
about.pillar3.body: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance is a hard requirement — not a checkbox.
about.contact.body: Reach the AICOE team through your departmental AI liaison or through the EVA platform.
products.hero.sub: AI tools built by AICOE for the Government of Canada.
products.section.heading: Available Products
products.eva-jp.feature1: Hybrid RAG over jurisprudence and statute indexes
products.eva-jp.feature3: RBAC with persona switching (researcher, clerk, admin)
products.eva-jp.feature4: Azure AI Search + Azure OpenAI powered
products.accelerator.feature2: Entry and exit survey workflows for governance
products.accelerator.feature4: AI assistant panel wired to EVA Brain v2
progress.hero.sub: Read-only delivery visibility for EVA Foundry core projects, refreshed from live GitHub Project boards and published as a public status surface.
progress.source.live: Live GitHub Projects snapshot filtered to the Foundry core projects you selected. Calculated metrics are derived from the same snapshot, not sample data.
progress.empty: No matching work items are in the current snapshot.
